The '''''Fireclaw''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] that saw service with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
While patrolling the [[Lifh sector/Legends|Lifh sector]], the ''Fireclaw'' was hacked by [[R2z-DL]] and [[Koedi Raef]], who redirected it away from [[Vilosoria]] so the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] could overthrow the Imperial garrison there.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
